allow: Bash(cd /home/xel/work/canmv_k230/src/rtsmart/rtsmart/kernel/rt-thread; echo "=== how is syscall table indexed? \(numbered or by name\) ==="; grep -n "SYSCALL_SIGN\\|syscall_table\\|__NR_\\|lwp_get_sys_api\\|syscall_func" components/lwp/lwp_syscall.c | head; echo; echo "=== pipe2 anywhere in kernel/musl headers used by build ==="; grep -rn "pipe2" components/lwp/ 2>/dev/null | head; echo "=== check the toolchain musl: does pipe\(\) use SYS_pipe2? ==="; grep -rn "SYS_pipe\\b\\|SYS_pipe2\\|__NR_pipe" /home/xel/.kendryte/k230_toolchains/*/sysroot/usr/include/bits/syscall.h 2>/dev/null | head)
